heading: EJSON (Extended JSON)
body:
The `EJSON` global module is similar to [JSON](atlas-json) but
preserves additional [Extended JSON](manual/reference/mongodb-extended-json) type information.

EJSON is a superset of standard JSON that adds additional support for
types that are available in [BSON](atlas-bson) but not included in the
[JSON specification](https://www.json.org/).

| Method            | Description                                                       |
| ----------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------- |
| EJSON.parse()     | Parse a serialized Extended JSON string into a JavaScript object. |
| EJSON.stringify() | Serialize a JavaScript object into an ExtendedJSON string.        |
